case_title: HING MOON LAU VS. FRY QUINTEN JOSEPH

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY LAU, HING MOON AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, FRY QUINTEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-08-2014 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (FORWARDED TO DEPT. 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, HING MOON

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES FILED BY FRY QUINTEN JOSEPH ON NOV-14-2014 - DENIED. "PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR FEE WAIVER IS DENIED", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-08-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-06-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MUST BRING HIS OWN CANTONESE INTERPRETER TO THE NEXT HEARING DATE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-06-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED IN MANDARIN BY YAN YAN WHO WAS A DEFENDANT IN ANOTHER CASE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS: THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, HING MOON AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, FRY QUINTEN
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AS TO PLAINTIFF LAU, HING MOON HEARING SET FOR NOV-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-23-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-19-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
RETURNED MAIL: MAIL SENT TO FRY QUINTEN JOSEPH ON NOV14, 2014 RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-23-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY CANTONESE INTERPRETER---MARVIN CHEN. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-06-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-10-2015 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED IN CANTONESE. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK: B. PAREDES, (506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S CANTONESE INTERPRETER BANNIE CHOW WAS PRESENT IN COURT TODAY. THE INTERPRETER'S IDENTIFICATION HAS BEEN VERIFIED, VIA EMPLOYEE BADGE OR OTHER DOCUMENTATION PROVING CERTIFICATION OR REGISTRATION AND PHOTO IDENTIFICATION. THE INTERPRETER HAS AN OATH ON FILE WITH THE COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER (FW-008)- ORDER ON COURT FEE WAIVER AFTER HEARING (SUPERIOR COURT) -FEE WAIVER DENIED
FILING FEE PAID FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, HING MOON
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAU, HING MOON AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH, FRY QUINTEN

ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 THE COURT DENIES YOUR REQUEST BECAUSE THE INFORMATION YOU PROVIDED ON THE REQUEST SHOWS THAT YOU ARE NOT ELIGIBLE FOR THE FEE WAIVER YOU REQUESTED. AS TO PLAINTIFF LAU, HING MOON
